topics.label: JSX & Components
topics.description: Function components, JSX syntax, and component composition.

topics.label: Props
topics.description: Pass data to child components. Props are read-only.

topics.label: State (useState)
topics.description: Local component state with useState hook. State triggers re-renders.

topics.label: Event Handling
topics.description: onClick, onChange, onSubmit. Synthetic events and handler functions.

topics.label: Conditional Rendering
topics.description: Ternary, &&, and early return patterns for conditional UI.

topics.label: Lists & Keys
topics.description: Render arrays with map(). Keys help React track list items.

phases.label: Hooks & Patterns
phases.description: useEffect, context, refs, and common patterns.

topics.label: useEffect
topics.description: Side effects — fetch data, subscriptions, DOM manipulation. Cleanup functions.

topics.label: useContext
topics.description: Share state across components without prop drilling.

topics.label: useRef
topics.description: Access DOM elements and persist mutable values across renders.

topics.label: useMemo & useCallback
topics.description: Memoize expensive computations and callback functions.

topics.label: Custom Hooks
topics.description: Extract reusable logic into custom hooks (useLocalStorage, useFetch, etc.).

topics.label: useReducer
topics.description: Complex state logic with reducer pattern. Alternative to multiple useState.

topics.label: React Router
topics.description: Client-side routing with Routes, Route, Link, useNavigate, useParams.

topics.label: State Management
topics.description: Zustand, Jotai, or Redux Toolkit for global state.

topics.label: Forms
topics.description: React Hook Form or controlled components for form handling and validation.

topics.label: Data Fetching
topics.description: TanStack Query (React Query) for server state, caching, and mutations.

topics.label: Testing
topics.description: React Testing Library with Jest/Vitest. Test by user behavior, not implementation.

topics.label: Performance
topics.description: React.memo, lazy loading, Suspense, and React DevTools profiler.
